title: These are excellent opportunities to network, learn, and experience deep-dives into many data-relate
description:
These are excellent opportunities to network, learn, and experience deep-dives into many data-related topics.	
PASS Data Community Summit: https://passdatacommunitysummit.com/ Chicago: May 7-8 Frankfurt: June 10-11 Seattle: November 9-11 More Events Additional events are posted here as they are announced: https://sqlsaturday.com/ https://dataevents.co/microsoft https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/events Microsoft CFS: https://www.communitydays.org/calls
